name: Kids Foam Party
metaTitle: Kids Foam Party Rental Nova Scotia | Bridgewater | Nova Kingdom Rentals
metaDescription: Kids Foam Party rental for birthday parties, school fun days, daycares, summer camps, church events, and family celebrations across Nova Scotia. From $200/hr add-on or from $349/hr standalone.
shortDescription: High-energy foam fun for kids' birthdays, school fun days, daycares, summer camps, church events, and family celebrations.
fullDescription:
Make your next kids' event unforgettable with a Nova Kingdom Rentals Kids Foam Party. Our foam machine blasts kid-safe, non-toxic foam into a wild, waist-high foam zone — kids love running through it, playing in it, and splashing around. Setup and takedown included. Water source and power access required. Outdoor only on a flat, grassy area.

Kids Foam Party is designed for children's events only — it is not available for adult events or alcohol-serving events. Best for ages 3–14.
features: High-output foam machine on tripod stand
Hourly pricing by guest count — no surprise fees
Add-on pricing available with any inflatable rental
